div.div:
f1, f2 = system.evaluate([x, y])
a, b, c, d = system.jacobian([x, y])
det = a*d - b*c

div.div:
dx = (-f1*d + f2*b) / det
dy = (-a*f2 + c*f1) / det

div.div:
x = x + dx
y = y + dy
err = max(|dx|, |dy|)
